profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk engages in the film production and film post-production business in Indonesia. It is also involved in the distribution of films, videos and television programs by the private sector. In addition, the company offers film and video recording, export and import of film and video, film studios, film location and equipment rental, film equipment trade, film making services, film laboratory services, film distribution services, cinema services, and film making television programs. PT Verona Indah Pictures Tbk was founded in 2010 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
